www.protocol.policy.content:
1. Information Collection

When you visit our website, we may collect the following information:

Personal information you provide, such as your name, email address, phone number, etc.;

Information automatically collected through cookies and other technologies, such as your IP address, browser type, access time and date, type of device used, etc.


We use this information to:

(1)Respond to your inquiries;

(2)Provide you with requested services;

(3)Process orders and payments;

(4)Send updates and promotional information;

(5)Improve our website and services;

(6)Provide you with personalized experiences.


2. Information Sharing

We may share your personal information with the following third parties:

(1)We may share your personal information with the following third parties:

(2)Vendors and service providers who support and provide services to us;

(3)Legal, regulatory, law enforcement, and government agencies who need to protect our rights, property, or safety.

*We promise not to sell, exchange, or rent your information. We will take appropriate measures to ensure the security of the third party receiving your personal information.


3. Data Storage and Security

We will take reasonable measures to protect your personal information, including:

(1)Using technologies such as password protection, data encryption, physical and electronic access controls to protect your personal information;

(2)Storing your personal information on servers and taking necessary security measures to prevent unauthorized access, use, modification, disclosure, or destruction;

(3)Regularly reviewing and updating our security measures to ensure their effectiveness.


4. Cookies and Other Technologies

We may use cookies and other technologies to enhance your browsing experience. For example, we use cookies to:

(1)Remember your login information;

(2)Save your shopping cart information;

(3)Identify your preferences and interests;

(4)Collect statistical information about website usage.

*You can refuse cookies by setting your browser preferences, but this may affect your browsing experience.


5. Privacy Access and Correction

You may access and correct your personal information at any time. If you wish to access or correct your information, please contact us through our contact information.


6. Privacy Policy Changes

We may update this privacy policy periodically. We will post any changes on our website, and you will be deemed to have accepted the updated privacy policy.
www.protocol.policy.title: Privacy Policy
www.protocol.service.content:
Welcome to use Flytrade, a service provided by Shenzhen Qifeifan Technology Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "Flytrade"). This User Service Agreement (hereinafter referred to as "Agreement") is a legal agreement between you and Flytrade. Please read this Agreement carefully before using Flytrade service. By using Flytrade service, you agree to be bound by this Agreement. If you do not agree to be bound by this Agreement, please do not use Flytrade service.


1. Service Content

Flytrade is an online trading platform that provides users with product information, transaction services, and other related services. Users can use Flytrade to browse product information, communicate with suppliers, place orders, and make payments.


2. User Qualifications

Users of Flytrade must be individuals or legal entities with full capacity for civil conduct. If you do not have full capacity for civil conduct, please do not use Flytrade service.


3. User Registration

To use Flytrade service, users need to complete the registration process and obtain a Flytrade account. Users should provide accurate and complete information during the registration process. Users are responsible for maintaining the security of their account information and passwords. Flytrade will not be responsible for any losses caused by users' failure to keep their account information and passwords secure.


4. User Behavior

Users shall use Flytrade service in compliance with laws, regulations, and this Agreement. Users shall not engage in any behavior that violates the legitimate rights and interests of others, infringes intellectual property rights, or violates laws and regulations. Users shall not use Flytrade service to engage in any illegal or fraudulent activities.


5. Service Interruption and Termination

Flytrade may suspend or terminate Flytrade service in whole or in part at any time for any reason, with or without notice to users. Flytrade shall not be liable to users or any third party for any damages arising from the suspension or termination of Flytrade service.


6. Disclaimer

(1) Users understand and agree that Flytrade will not be responsible for any service interruption or user data loss caused by force majeure or other uncontrollable reasons.


(2) Users understand and agree that Flytrade will not be responsible for any indirect, special, incidental, or consequential losses caused by users' use of Flytrade service, including but not limited to loss of profits, business reputation, and business opportunities.


(3) Flytrade makes no express or implied warranties with respect to the services provided by Flytrade, including but not limited to the applicability, accuracy, timeliness, security, completeness, confidentiality, etc. of the services.


(4) Agreement Modification


(5) Flytrade has the right to modify the terms of this Agreement based on actual situations. Once this Agreement is modified, Flytrade will publish the latest Agreement terms on its website, and users should check them regularly.


(6) If users do not agree with the modifications made by Flytrade to the Agreement terms, they should stop using Flytrade service. If users continue to use Flytrade service, they will be deemed to have accepted the modifications made to the Agreement terms.


(7) Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


(8) The formation, performance, and interpretation of this Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China.


(9)  Any dispute arising from this Agreement shall be resolved through friendly consultation. If consultation fails, either party may bring a lawsuit to the court with jurisdiction.


Contact Information of Flytrade:

Company Name: Shenzhen Qifeifan Technology Co., Ltd.

English Name: Flytrade

Address: LongHua District, Shenzhen City, Guangdong Province, China

Email: info@sslfly.com
www.protocol.service.title: User Service Agreement

www.protocol.faq.question: Where is our location?
www.protocol.faq.answer: Our headquarters are located in Dubai, and we offer smartwatch services worldwide. Our main office addresses are in Dubai, Guangzhou, and Shenzhen. If you need to visit us, please contact us by sending an email to ccit.flytrade@gmail.com.

www.protocol.faq.question: How to place an order?
www.protocol.faq.answer: Our website is still in its early stage of development and does not currently support online payments. Our development team is working hard to implement this feature, and we will support online payments in the future. If you need to place an order, please contact our sales manager, and our sales team will be ready to assist you at any time.

www.protocol.faq.question: How to register, how to log in, and how to change password?
www.protocol.faq.answer:
How to register?
Click on the "User Icon" on the top right corner of our website homepage.
Fill in your personal information, including your email address and password.
Read and agree to our terms of service and privacy policy.
Click the "Register" button.

How to log in?
Click on the "Log in" button on our website homepage.
Enter your email address and password.
Click the "Log in" button.

How to change password?
After logging in, go to "My Account" page.
Click on the "Change Password" button.
Enter your current password and new password, and confirm the new password.
Click the "Change Password" button to save changes.

www.protocol.faq.question: The question is about website terms and conditions, how to contact us, and cooperation opportunities？
www.protocol.faq.answer:
Regarding Website Terms:
Please visit our website's "Privacy Policy and User Service Agreement" page.

Regarding Contact Us:
If you need help or have any questions, please contact us through our website contact page (ccit.flytrade@gmail.com). Our customer support team will reply to your email as soon as possible.

Regarding Partnership Opportunities:
If you have any partnership opportunities related to our business, please contact us through our website contact page (ccit.flytrade@gmail.com). We will respond to your email promptly, provide all resources to serve you, and discuss partnership matters with you.

www.protocol.faq.question: How to submit a question, how to contact customer support, and related solutions in website FAQs?
www.protocol.faq.answer:
How to submit a question?

You can contact us through our website contact page (ccit.flytrade@gmail.com). Please describe your problem as detailed as possible, and our customer support team will reply to your email as soon as possible and provide relevant solutions.

How to contact customer support?

If you need help or have any questions, please contact us through our website contact page (ccit.flytrade@gmail.com). Our customer support team will reply to your email as soon as possible and provide relevant solutions.

Relevant solutions?

Our customer support team will provide relevant solutions according to your problems and offer support and assistance. We also provide some common questions and solutions in our website FAQ to help you solve problems more quickly.

company.basic.work_location: Block C, Huaqiang Plaza, No. 1019 Huaqiang North Road, Hua Hang Community, Huaqiang North Street, Futian District, Shenzhen
www.cooperate.common_description:
CCIT.Flytrade is an enterprise focusing on the research and development of smart watch products, headquartered in Dubai, with offices in Guangzhou and Shenzhen. Flytrade is committed to providing global consumers with high-quality smart watch products and services, covering multiple scenarios such as sports and health, life and leisure, and creating an excellent smart watch experience for users.

As an industry leader, CCIT.Flytrade has extensive experience and expertise in smart watch technology, and is committed to providing high-performance, high-quality products and solutions to provide users with a full range of smart watch experience. At the same time, CCIT.Flytrade upholds the concept of win-win cooperation and is willing to work together with partners from all over the world to jointly promote the development of the smart watch industry and create a better future.
www.cooperate.technology_content_descrip:
1. Develop an application for smart watches, allowing users to perform health monitoring, exercise records, social chat and other operations through the watch.
2. Build an e-commerce platform for watches, so that users can browse, purchase watch products, and perform online payment operations on the platform.
3. Build a product data management system for watches to manage related data such as watch production, sales, and inventory.
4. Upgrade and maintain the company's existing infrastructure, including network, server, storage and other equipment.
www.cooperate.technology_require_descrip:
1. Possess relevant application design and development experience, be familiar with the smart watch operating system, be able to optimize according to the hardware characteristics of the watch, and ensure the stability and performance of the application.
2. Possess relevant e-commerce platform design and development experience, and be able to carry out customized development according to the company's business needs to ensure the security and stability of the platform.
3. Possess relevant data management system design and development experience, and be able to carry out customized development according to the company's business needs to ensure the security and stability of the system.
4. Possess relevant infrastructure upgrade and maintenance experience, be able to quickly respond and solve equipment failures, and ensure the normal operation of the company's business.
www.cooperate.supplier_content_descripti:
1. Supplier background: Introduce the supplier's company background, including company size, product line, quality control system, production capacity and other information.
2. Product category: specify the type and style of watches needed, such as men's and women's watches, mechanical watches, electronic watches, sports watches, etc.
3. Product quality: describe the quality requirements of the watch in detail, including appearance, material, craftsmanship, function, etc.
4. Brand cooperation: If brand cooperation is required, suppliers are required to provide corresponding brand authorization and marketing support.
www.cooperate.supplier_require_descripti:
1. Price requirements: Determine a reasonable price range and require suppliers to provide competitive quotations.
2. Supply cycle: Determine the supply cycle and stability of suppliers to ensure the timeliness and continuity of supply.
3. Customer service: Suppliers are required to provide a complete customer service system, including pre-sales, sales, after-sales services, and repair and maintenance support.
4. Contract terms: After confirming the cooperation intention, sign the supply contract to clarify the rights and obligations of both parties, as well as the liability for breach of contract and the solution.
www.company.video_description: Flytrade is a dynamic and innovative enterprise, which is user-centric and committed to providing users with high-quality services and products. Flytrade believes that in the near future, it will become a great company and develop more excellent products to contribute more value to users!
company.basic.company_introduce: In 2020, as a college student entrepreneur, we created the "Fly Zhuke" project (WeChat applet), aiming to better serve students at school, help students in need solve problems, and provide poor students with money-making opportunities. Chance. This project has brought a lot of traffic and benefits to our team. Subsequently, we formally established Qifeifan Technology Co., Ltd. In 2021, we will set our sights further, cooperate with the CCIT brand, open a foreign trade route, create the "Flytrade" project, and decide to start developing our own products. On the way of exploration and innovation, we never stop!
company.basic.company_mission:
Create great products for users
Create a pleasant and progressive working atmosphere for employees
Establish a mutual trust and win-win cooperation platform for partners
Provide long-term and stable returns for shareholders
company.basic.company_vision: Our pursuit is to become a world-leading enterprise with continuous development and commitment to health
company.basic.company_core: User-oriented, design-driven innovation, constantly learning and progressing

company.main_members.index.name: Frank
company.main_members.index.responsibility: Responsible for the success or failure of the company, including overseeing all aspects of company operations, market strategy, finance, corporate culture establishment, human resources, hiring, firing, compliance with safety regulations, sales, public relations, and more.
company.main_members.index.introduction: Frank is one of the outstanding founders of Flytrade, as well as a co-founder and chairman of the board. He possesses abundant experience and excellent management skills, and his career has been closely associated with large aircraft companies for a long time. With his visionary strategic thinking and rich experience accumulated in the structure of the world's largest companies, he has achieved remarkable success in the process of creating Flytrade. Mr. IVAN is passionate about the latest technology, sports, and automobiles. He draws inspiration from great figures and never gives up, firmly believing that any goal in life can be achieved with determination and time.

company.company_history.index.title: Hoist the Sail
company.company_history.index.description: We, college students, founded Shenzhen Qifan Technology Co., Ltd. Our aim is to provide services and solutions for students, create earning opportunities, and bring real help and change through entrepreneurship.

company.company_history.index.title: Campus Project
company.company_history.index.description: We created "FlyZHUKE" WeChat mini program and campus forum for students. It provides services, earning opportunities, and promotes communication among peers. Our efforts have been successful and our reputation on campus has grown rapidly.

company.company_history.index.title: Technological Development
company.company_history.index.description: Developing new business system for company growth, including front-end display, back-end management, ERP, permission and configuration systems.

company.company_history.index.title: CCIT.flytrade
company.company_history.index.description: We developed a mature foreign trade system, entered the market, and created the CCIT.Flytrade project to research and sell high-quality watches.

www.protocol.sales.content:
Welcome to the official website of Flytrade!

Here, we provide you with high-quality products and excellent service. Please read the following sales policy carefully before making a purchase:


1. Orders and Payments: Placing an order on our website signifies your agreement to purchase the selected products. We strive to ensure accurate product information on our website, but we reserve the right to correct errors and cancel orders if necessary.We accept various payment methods, including credit cards, debit cards, Alipay, and other international payment methods. You can choose your preferred payment method at the checkout page.


2. Prices and Currencies: All product prices are subject to market adjustments. We support other major currencies such as US Dollars (USD), Euros (EUR), and more. You can select your desired currency at the checkout page.Please note that currency exchange rates may cause slight variations between the displayed price and the final price.


3. Shipping and Delivery: We strive to process and ship your order as soon as possible after receiving payment. The delivery time depends on your location and the chosen shipping method.Shipping fees are calculated based on the weight, dimensions, and destination of the order and will be displayed at the checkout page. Please note that international shipping may incur additional customs duties and taxes, which are the responsibility of the buyer.


4. Returns and Refunds: If you encounter any quality issues with the received products, please contact us within 7 working days after receiving the goods. We will do our best to resolve the issue and provide return or refund services.When returning a product, it must be in its original condition and accompanied by complete packaging and accessories. Refunds will be processed upon confirmation of receiving the returned item and conducting an inspection.


5. Privacy Protection: We highly value the protection of your personal information. When using our website, we employ appropriate security measures to safeguard your information and only use it when necessary.Please refer to our Privacy Policy for more information on how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.


If you have any questions or need further assistance regarding the above sales policy, please feel free to contact us via the following means:

  • Email: info@sslfly.com
  • Phone: +86 18903011871

Thank you for choosing Flytrade! We look forward to providing you with outstanding products and services.


Please note that the above sales policy may be subject to adjustments and updates as needed. The latest version of the sales policy will always be published on our website.
www.protocol.sales.title: Sales Policy
